zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Appolonia Bayer於1712年2月25日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆時，她的父親Johann Andreas Beyer30歲，母親Anna Apollonia Hedderich28歲。她於1738年10月25日與Johann Nicholas Becker Sr在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1762年10月在美國維吉尼亞州洛可布利其福雷德利可斯包格享年50歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州申南多阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Appolonia Bayer于1712年2月25日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆时，她的父亲Johann Andreas Beyer30岁，母亲Anna Apollonia Hedderich28岁。她于1738年10月25日与Johann Nicholas Becker Sr在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1762年10月在美国弗吉尼亚州洛可布利其福雷德利可斯包格享年50岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州申南多阿。

nameMeanings.name: Bayer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

variants.name: Beyerle
meanings: German:
from a Swabian diminutive of   Bayer  .
variant of   Beuerle  .

variants.name: Beyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ewald, Klaus, Alois, Arno, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Theodor.
German, Scandinavian, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.
Dutch: variant of Beijer, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Klaus, Ernst, Dieter, Erwin, Hartmut, Heinz, Matthias, Theodor.
German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  .

variants.name: Bayers
meanings: Americanized form of German (and possibly also Dutch)   Bayer   or   Beyers  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Byers  .

variants.name: Baier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Armin, Dieter, Hans, Hilde, Otto, Claus, Erhart, Ernst, Florian, Frieda.
German: variant of   Bayer  .

variants.name: Bayerl
meanings: German: from a pet form of   Bayer  .

variants.name: Buyer
meanings: Altered form of German Bayer of Scottish Byer , by folk-etymological association with the English vocabulary word buyer.

variants.name: Boehm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Bernd, Dieter, Helmut, Wolfgang, Erwin, Guenter.

German (mainly Böhm) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Böhm): ethnic or habitational name for a native or inhabitant of Bohemia (now the western part of Czechia), from Böhmen, German name of Bohemia (Middle High German Böheim, Bēheim). This derives its name from the tribal name Baii + heim ‘homeland’. The Baii were a tribe, probably Celtic-speaking, who inhabited the region in the 1st century AD and were gradually displaced by Slavic settlers in the period up to the 5th century. The same tribe also gave their name to Bavaria (see Bayer ). Bohemia was an independent Slavic kingdom from the 7th century to 1526, when it fell to the Habsburgs. In 1627 it was formally declared a Habsburg Crown Land, and by the Treaty of Versailles it became a province of the newly formed Czechoslovakia in 1919. The surname in the form Boehm is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Bame , Beahm , Behm , Bihm , and Bohm .

variants.name: Beyerlein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz.
German: variant of Bayerlein, which is a diminutive of Bayer .
South German: variant of Beuerlein , which is a variant of Bäuerlein (see Bauerlein ).

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Appolonia Bayer was born on 25 February 1712, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Johann Andreas Beyer, was 30 and her mother, Anna Apollonia Hedderich, was 28. She married Johann Nicholas Becker Sr on 25 October 1738, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in October 1762, in Fredericksburg, Rockbridge, Virginia, United States, at the age of 50, and was buried in Shenandoah, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Appolonia Bayer est née le 25 février 1712, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Johann Andreas Beyer, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Apollonia Hedderich, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Johann Nicholas Becker Sr le 25 octobre 1738, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1762, à Fredericksburg, Rockbridge, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Shenandoah, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.Shenandoah Valley, Shenandoah, Colony of: Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Appolonia Bayer am 25. Februar 1712 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Andreas Beyer 30 und ihre Mutter Anna Apollonia Hedderich 28. Sie hat am 25. Oktober 1738 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Johann Nicholas Becker Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1762 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Fredericksburg, Rockbridge, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Shenandoah, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Appolonia Bayer è nata il il 25 febbraio 1712 nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Johann Andreas Beyer, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anna Apollonia Hedderich, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Johann Nicholas Becker Sr il 25 ottobre 1738, nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Maria Appolonia Bayerが1712年2月25日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムで生まれた時，父Johann Andreas Beyerは30歳，母Anna Apollonia Hedderichは28歳であった。1738年10月25日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムでJohann Nicholas Becker Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1762年10月にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ロクブリッジフレデリクスブルグで50歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州シェナンドアにて埋葬された。

ko.Shenandoah Valley, Shenandoah, Colony of: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어 셰난도 발리
ko.lifeSummary: Maria Appolonia Bayer(이)가 1712년 2월 25일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Andreas Beyer(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Apollonia Hedderich(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1738년 10월 25일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 Johann Nicholas Becker Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1762년 10월 미국 버지니아 주 록브리지 프레더릭크스버그에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 셰난도에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Appolonia Bayer nasceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1712, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Andreas Beyer, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Apollonia Hedderich, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Johann Nicholas Becker Sr em 25 de outubro de 1738, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1762, em Fredericksburg, Rockbridge, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Shenandoah, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Shenandoah Valley, Shenandoah, Colony of: шенандоах валли, дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Appolonia Bayer родилась 25 февраля 1712 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Johann Andreas Beyer было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Apollonia Hedderich, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Nicholas Becker Sr 25 октября 1738 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла октябрь 1762 г. в местности фредирикксбург, роккбридж, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности шенандоах, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Appolonia Bayer nació el 25 de febrero de 1712, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Johann Andreas Beyer, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Apollonia Hedderich, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Johann Nicholas Becker Sr el 25 de octubre de 1738, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1762, en Fredericksburg, Rockbridge, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Shenandoah, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
